title: [security] Key material exposure in oscore_ctx, link_ctx, EDHOC structs (P0)
description: oscore.h:206-234 exposes master_secret/sender_key/recipient_key in public struct (not opaque). link_ctx.c holds ed25519_sk/live keys with incomplete wipe on all error paths. EDHOC contexts hold ed_seed long-term. Many memcpy without guaranteed secure zero on all paths; relies on caller calling wipe(). No mlock/secure mem. Stack buffers wiped on some but not all early returns. Dev stubs log insecure keys. Matches "key handling" and "incomplete zeroing". discovered-from:project-LICHEN-lw4f
close_reason: Decomposed into subtasks iaui.1-4 (opaque structs, zeroization paths, EDHOC seed handling, dev key logging). Now an epic.
